_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Over 1559 proteins and over 2455 phospho-proteins were identified in primary schwannoma vs. Schwann cells
details: Successfully identified over 1559 proteins and over 2455 phospho-proteins in schwannoma analysis, and over 2582 proteins and 2505 phospho-proteins in meningioma analysis
